message:
fix(sync): drop mutex guard before returning from register_waker

Corrects the register_waker method to properly release the Mutex guard
before returning the result. The previous implementation could hold the
lock longer than necessary due to implicit drop timing.

Changes:
- Change waiter_flag parameter from `&Option<Arc<AtomicBool>>` to
  `Option<&Arc<AtomicBool>>` for more idiomatic borrowing
- Explicitly assign match result to variable and drop guard before return
- Update WaitInit::poll to use `.as_ref()` for the new parameter signature

This ensures the waiters mutex is released immediately after the
registration logic completes, preventing potential contention in
high-concurrency async scenarios.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
